description: Letter from Nahray b. Nissim, Alexandria, to Abū Isḥāq Ibrāhīm (a.k.a. ʿIwāḍ) b. Ḥananel, Fustat. Abū l-Khayr became ill following ʿIwāḍ's departure, and his mother suffered greatly on his account. He then improved. Nahray himself developed an abscess on his left hip. He too recovered, but the remnants of the illness are still with him. He was not able to go about his work until the present moment. The rest of the letter deals with business matters. ASE.
tags: Nahray B. Nissim, illness: skin, illness: remnants, Illness, illness letter 969-1517, trade
description_he: מכתב מנהריי בן נסים, אלכסנדריה, לאבו יצחק אברהים (עואד') בן חנאנאל, פוסטאט. אבו אל-ח'יר חלה, לנהריי צמח מורסה בירך שמאל; שניהם החלימו. ענייני מסחר.
